description: AC4 -- Sprint A gates re-run after all F7-B changes (damping, periodic advance_mu_t, dn/rdn metric fix, pure-sigma override, force_fp64, p_buoy buoyancy, flux/diffusion modules). Damping defaults OFF on the oracle path, so these gates exercise the same bare core as Sprint A.

flat_rest_AC3.note: machine-exact zero on all prognostics at rest

analytic_acoustic_AC4.note: warm +1K bubble: upward w above, downward below, ph rise aloft; w_abs_max identical to the Sprint A baseline (0.3243...), so the shared core is byte-stable under the F7-B changes

no_stub_audit.note: the three legacy stubs (_advance_geopotential, _diagnose_pressure, _ph_tend_increment) remain absent from the core (Sprint A AC1)

verdict: AC4 PASS -- no regression. The Sprint A flat-rest, analytic, conservation and no-stub gates all hold unchanged after the F7-B work; the analytic w_abs_max matches the Sprint A value to all printed digits.
